div.head: 276. Memorandum From Director of Central Intelligence Dulles to the President’s Special Assistant for National Security Affairs (Gray)Source: Eisenhower Library, Whitman File, Intelligence Matters (9). Secret. The source text bears no drafting information.

list.head: SUBJECT
list.item: [less than 1 line of source text not declassified] Resistance Program

div.p:
1. Referring to your recent conversation on 30 March concerning my proposal by memorandum of 27 March 1959 on the above subject,See Document 277 and its attachment. I
wish to assure you that full consideration has been given to the points that you have raised.
[3 paragraphs (21 lines of source text) not declassified]
